meta.description: skel scans your dev environment — packages, shell configs, editors, dotfiles, language versions — and saves it as a portable profile. Restore it on any Mac with a single command.

commands.name: skel scan
commands.description: Scan your Mac and save a profile. Captures packages, shell, editors, git, languages, configs, and system defaults.

commands.name: skel show
commands.description: Display full profile contents with section-level details.

commands.name: skel list
commands.description: List saved profiles (interactive in terminal, plain output when piped).

commands.name: skel doctor
commands.description: Pre-flight check before you restore. Shows exactly what's missing and how to fix it — nothing gets installed.

commands.name: skel restore
commands.description: Interactive section picker. Skips what's already installed. Supports --dry-run and --only flags.

commands.name: skel drift
commands.description: See what's changed on your Mac since the last scan — new tools, removed packages, config changes.

commands.name: skel diff
commands.description: Compare two profiles side-by-side. Useful for tracking differences between machines or environments.

commands.name: skel status
commands.description: One-line profile summary (name, age, item count) without rescanning.

commands.name: skel update
commands.description: Re-scan this machine and update an existing profile.

commands.name: skel export
commands.description: Export a profile to a JSON file.

commands.name: skel import
commands.description: Import a profile from a JSON file.

commands.name: skel publish
commands.description: Publish your profile as a GitHub Gist. Git name, email, hostname, and SSH key comments are auto-redacted.

commands.name: skel clone
commands.description: Clone a profile from a public GitHub Gist. No auth required.

commands.name: skel brewfile export
commands.description: Export Homebrew data from a profile to a Brewfile.

commands.name: skel brewfile import
commands.description: Import a Brewfile into a profile (creates profile from taps/formulas/casks/mas apps).

coverage.name: Homebrew
coverage.detail: Taps, formulas, casks, App Store via mas

coverage.name: Shell
coverage.detail: Zsh, Fish, Bash — configs, Oh My Zsh, Starship

coverage.name: Editors
coverage.detail: VS Code, Cursor, Neovim, JetBrains IDEs

coverage.name: Languages
coverage.detail: Node, Python, Go, Ruby, Rust, Java, PHP

coverage.name: Packages
coverage.detail: npm, pip, cargo, gems, pnpm, composer

coverage.name: Defaults
coverage.detail: Dock, Finder, keyboard, trackpad, screenshot preferences

coverage.name: SSH
coverage.detail: Public key fingerprints only (no private keys)

share.label: Publish to Gist
share.description: Pushes your profile to a GitHub Gist. PII is auto-redacted before upload — git identity, hostname, SSH key comments.

share.label: Clone from Gist
share.description: Pull any public Gist profile in one command. Review it with skel show before restoring to a new machine.
